allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "\(?i\)claude|electron" } | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle | Format-Table -AutoSize')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mcps=d.get\('mcpServers',{}\); [print\(k\) for k in mcps]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mcps=d.get\('mcpServers',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(mcps, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8001/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -D - -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"claude","version":"1.0"}}}')

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('IsValid:', d.get\('IsValid'\)\); print\('IdpClientId:', d.get\('IdpClientId'\)\); print\('IdpClientSecret:', 'SET' if d.get\('IdpClientSecret'\) else None\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8002/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -D - -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"claude","version":"1.0"}}}')

Bash(python3 -c " import sys data = sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\).decode\('utf-16-le', errors='ignore'\) for line in data.splitlines\(\): l = line.strip\(\) if l: print\(l\) ")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8001/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -H 'Authorization: Bearer __TRACKED_VAR__' -D - -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"claude","version":"1.0"}}}')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''npm-cli.js install'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''npm-cli.js install'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine')
